requirement_topic.en: China GB 44240-2024 / GB/T 36276-2023 Crosswalk to Jordan Evidence

summary.en: Jordan reviewers may accept or request IEC-numbered evidence, Jordan standards, contract specifications, or project-specific technical files. China GB 44240-2024 and GB/T 36276-2023 should therefore be presented as mapped technical evidence, not as automatic substitutes for Jordan, IEC, EMRC, NEPCO, customs, or project requirements.
summary.zh: 约旦审查方可能接受或要求IEC编号证据、约旦标准、合同规范或项目特定技术文件。因此，中国GB 44240-2024和GB/T 36276-2023应作为映射后的技术证据提交，而不是自动替代约旦、IEC、EMRC、NEPCO、海关或项目要求。
summary.zht: 約旦審查方可能接受或要求IEC編號證據、約旦標準、合約規範或項目特定技術文件。因此，中國GB 44240-2024和GB/T 36276-2023應作為映射後的技術證據提交，而不是自動替代約旦、IEC、EMRC、NEPCO、海關或項目要求。

standards_or_laws: JSMO standards and conformity route where applicable
EMRC / NEPCO project requirements where grid-connected

summary.en: GB 44240-2024 is the China mandatory safety standard for covered electric-energy-storage lithium-ion cells and batteries, while GB/T 36276-2023 is a common China recommended standard for lithium-ion batteries for electric energy storage. GB/T 36558-2023 is commonly used for electrochemical energy-storage system safety evidence.
summary.zh: GB 44240-2024是中国适用电力储能用锂离子电池和电池组的强制性安全标准，GB/T 36276-2023是中国电力储能用锂离子电池常用推荐性标准。GB/T 36558-2023常用于电化学储能系统安全证据。
summary.zht: GB 44240-2024是中國適用電力儲能用鋰離子電池和電池組的強制性安全標準，GB/T 36276-2023是中國電力儲能用鋰離子電池常用推薦性標準。GB/T 36558-2023常用於電化學儲能系統安全證據。

gap.en: Prepare a clause-by-clause crosswalk that identifies identical, partially covered, not covered, and not applicable clauses against IEC 62619 and the relevant IEC 62933 parts. Attach English translations, lab accreditation evidence, sample traceability, firmware and BOM version control, and explicit acceptance records from the Jordan reviewer.
gap.zh: 应准备逐条款映射，标出相对IEC 62619及相关IEC 62933分册的相同、部分覆盖、未覆盖和不适用条款。附英文翻译、实验室认可证据、样品追溯、固件和BOM版本控制，以及约旦审查方明确接受记录。
gap.zht: 應準備逐條款映射，標出相對IEC 62619及相關IEC 62933分冊的相同、部分覆蓋、未覆蓋和不適用條款。附英文翻譯、實驗室認可證據、樣品追溯、韌體和BOM版本控制，以及約旦審查方明確接受記錄。

mandatory_status.target: Project-specific or mandatory only when Jordan standards, JSMO route, EMRC / NEPCO review, customs, tender, owner, insurer, lender, or contract accepts or requires the mapped evidence
mandatory_status.cn: GB 44240-2024 is mandatory for covered China domestic products; GB/T 36276-2023 and GB/T 36558-2023 are recommended unless incorporated by regulation, project, or contract

source.publisher: State Administration for Market Regulation, National Public Service Platform for Standards Information

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] China GB evidence can reduce retesting and review effort only when mapped and accepted. It should not be marketed as a standalone Jordan approval.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 中国GB证据只有在完成映射并被接受时，才可能减少复测和审查工作量。不应将其宣传为独立的约旦批准。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 中國GB證據只有在完成映射並被接受時，才可能減少複測和審查工作量。不應將其宣傳為獨立的約旦批准。
